mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM answer WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_final = TRUE
SELECT AVG(f.total_score) FROM answer a JOIN feedback f ON f.answer_id = a.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.is_final = TRUE
SELECT AVG(f.total_score) FROM answer a JOIN feedback f ON f.answer_id = a.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.is_final = TRUE AND a.submitted_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY)
SELECT DISTINCT DATE_FORMAT(submitted_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS answer_date FROM answer WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_final = TRUE ORDER BY answer_date DESC

SELECT q.category, COUNT(*) AS answer_count, AVG(f.total_score) AS average_score FROM answer a JOIN question q ON a.question_id = q.id JOIN feedback f ON f.answer_id = a.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.is_final = TRUE GROUP BY q.category ORDER BY average_score DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(submitted_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS `date`, COUNT(*) AS count FROM answer WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_final = TRUE AND submitted_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{days} DAY) GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(submitted_at, '%Y-%m-%d') ORDER BY `date` ASC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(DATE_SUB(a.submitted_at, INTERVAL WEEKDAY(a.submitted_at) DAY), '%Y-%m-%d') AS week_start, q.category, AVG(f.total_score) AS average_score FROM answer a JOIN question q ON a.question_id = q.id JOIN feedback f ON f.answer_id = a.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.is_final = TRUE AND a.submitted_at >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL #{weeks} WEEK) GROUP BY week_start, q.category ORDER BY week_start ASC, q.category ASC

SELECT q.content AS question_content, q.category, f.total_score, DATE_FORMAT(a.submitted_at, '%Y-%m-%d') AS submitted_at FROM answer a JOIN question q ON a.question_id = q.id JOIN feedback f ON f.answer_id = a.id WHERE a.user_id = #{userId} AND a.is_final = TRUE ORDER BY a.submitted_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
